title: Energizer⚡
description: A complete overhaul of the Hunger system with Stamina!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00f1cfc50e35863190776616a17d176a203cbe92.png)

# No more Hunger, Stamina instead !

Stamina will decrease if you are sprinting or swimming.
Stamina will increase if you walk or simply stand still.  

![normal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/315d63a77f349a80386a65366b59fc2eae363939.jpeg)

Be careful, if you run out of stamina, you will not be able to sprint or swim until you completely recover your  
stamina !

![cant sprint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3162c15638e5a4c12f2fd484c039bbce59bee880.jpeg)

## Hunger or not ?

You can choose between keeping Hunger or not. It's your decision !  
(disabled by default)

![hunger bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25bea5b4946be9bf14d35070ad6a01977c93df7e.jpeg)

## Air bar is not a problem !

With the "_Sync with Stamina Bar_" option, the Air bar will stick at the top of the Stamina bar, no matter the number of rows or if you move the Stamina bar.  
(enabled by default)

![air bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c71d8bc01d63bba7f0aa57ae17495e3e60b3f93e.jpeg)

## Vigor effect

A new effect has been added, the Vigor effect.
It will stop the stamina depletion.  

Two potions have been added :

- the Vigor potion (10s) by adding a beetroot to an awkward potion.
- the Vigor long potion (30s) by adding a redstone dust to a Vigor potion.

![vigor effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdfc8ca4a9d3f26d8dbca05d796f1ae508e62263.jpeg)

## Hunger effect

The Hunger effect has additional effects now : it will debuff stamina depletion and regeneration.

![hunger effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f01cf88272f986d4ce935b49ce73588353f53da1.jpeg)

## Heal (only if Hunger is disabled)

Now, eating food will directly recover your health !

## Attribute

The stamina is a new attribute.
So, you can change your amount of stamina directly in the game.

![attribute](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/602692a7cd77c262af300f400f2762488051b73c.jpeg)

## Compatibilities

[Hearty Meals](https://modrinth.com/mod/hearty-meals) ✅

## Modpacks

You are free to use this mod in any modpacks, as long as you provide a link to this page.
